title: 'Winter Is Over': Standard Chartered Calls Crypto Bottom as Bitcoin Recovers From $60K Fall
summary: Standard Chartered analyst Geoff Kendrick suggests the crypto market has hit its lowest point following Bitcoin's recent drop below $60,000.
body:
Standard Chartered's Geoff Kendrick has declared that the crypto market has likely reached its bottom, following Bitcoin's recent dip below $60,000. This statement comes as Bitcoin shows signs of recovery, providing a glimmer of hope for investors who have weathered the storm of the past few months.

Kendrick, a well-known analyst, pointed to Bitcoin's recent price action as a key indicator. After falling to a low of $58,500, Bitcoin has since rebounded, currently trading above $62,000. This recovery aligns with Kendrick's assertion that the market has found its floor, suggesting that the worst of the downturn may be over.

For everyday crypto users, this news could signal a shift in market sentiment. A market bottom typically indicates that the worst of the price declines are behind us, potentially leading to a more stable or upward-trending market. This could be an opportune time for investors to reconsider their positions or for new investors to enter the market with more confidence.

However, it's important to note that market predictions can be volatile. While Kendrick's analysis is optimistic, investors should still exercise caution. Watch for continued price stability and positive market indicators before making significant investment decisions. Read more → https://decrypt.co/370907/winter-over-standard-chartered-calls-crypto-bottom-bitcoin-recovers-60k-fall
twitterThread: Bitcoin's recent dip below $60K may have marked the market bottom, says Standard Chartered analyst Geoff Kendrick. The recovery to $62K adds fuel to this optimism.
After hitting a low of $58,500, Bitcoin has rebounded, suggesting the worst of the downturn might be over. This could be a turning point for investors.

While Kendrick's analysis is promising, caution is still advised. Watch for continued stability before making major investment moves. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-12-winter-is-over-standard-chartered-says-crypto-market-has-bottomed
standaloneTweet: Bitcoin's dip below $60K may have been the market bottom, says Standard Chartered. With prices rebounding to $62K, could this be the start of a new upward trend?
